title: thelasis papuana
intro: Thelasis papuana, also known as the New Guinea orchid, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Papua New Guinea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thelasis papuana include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Thelasis papuana is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various health conditions.
